evals.prompt: Analyze the project at /home/ikktaa/app/JobPilot and produce vault note drafts for it
evals.expected_output: One project index draft + 3-6 feature note drafts, all in PRD 5.2/5.3 schema with YAML frontmatter, Key Components table, Workflow diagram, Reuse Notes, Adaptation Checklist. No files written to disk.

evals.prompt: I want to index /home/ikktaa/app/Resume-Matcher for my DevVault. Extract the reusable features.
evals.expected_output: One project index draft + 3-6 feature note drafts matching PRD schemas. Features should reflect actual Resume-Matcher capabilities. No disk writes.

evals.prompt: scan /home/ikktaa/app/TA and tell me what features are worth indexing for reuse
evals.expected_output: Project index + feature notes. If project is small, fewer features (2-3) is acceptable. Schema compliance still required.
